title: Java Full Stack Developer Career Roadmap
description: The complete journey from Java basics to full-stack cloud-native deployment.

steps.title: Phase 1: Java Language Core
steps.description: Master OOP, collections, threads, streams, and syntax.

steps.title: Phase 2: Spring Boot Microservices
steps.description: Build scalable REST APIs, configure database persistence, and implement JWT security.

steps.title: Phase 3: React Frontend
steps.description: Build high-performance UIs, manage state, and integrate REST services.

steps.title: Phase 4: DevOps & Deployment
steps.description: Dockerize applications, set up CI/CD pipelines, and deploy to AWS.

title: Modern Frontend Developer Roadmap
description: Deep dive into web standards, performance, React components, and state management.

steps.title: Phase 1: Web Fundamentals
steps.description: Master responsive layout engineering and vanilla JS operations.

steps.title: Phase 2: Core React Concepts
steps.description: Understand components, hooks, virtual DOM, and client routers.

steps.title: Phase 3: State Management & Build Tooling
steps.description: Optimize bundles using Vite, implement global store managers (Zustand, Query).
